name: Childhood Friend | Katsuki Bakugo
description:
Katsuki crashes out when his childhood friend / the-one-he-can't-stop-thinking-about-naked gets attacked.

He's out for fucking blood.

Thank you for stopping by!

I hope you enjoy a bit of pining Bakugo with a healthy dose of blood and violence!

♡(Mmm. My specialty.)♡

As always, let me know if anything is wonky! And don't be shy. You like this? Well I have more where that came from. Leave a comment (they fuel me), and hop around at some of my older bots!♡•°○°•♡

[This is heavily inspired by @rosethorn's popular bot! I figured I would take a crack at it with my own tone and writing style. Check theirs out if you havent!]
